message.content:
@startuml
actor SalesClerk
participant "«presentation»\nDefineNewCategoryUI" as UI
participant "«application»\nDefineNewCategoryController" as Controller
participant "«builder»\nCategoryBuilder" as Builder
participant "«domain»\ncategory:Category" as Category
participant "«repository»\nCategoryRepository" as Repository

SalesClerk -> UI: 1 Define new category
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 2 create
activate Controller
Controller --> UI: 3 asks user information
SalesClerk -> UI: 4 Code, Description
UI -> Controller: 5 addCategory(categoryCode, categoryDescription)
Controller -> Builder: 6 create
activate Builder
Controller -> Builder: 7 withCode(code)
Controller -> Builder: 8 withDescription(description)
Builder -> Category: 9 create(categoryCode, categoryDescription)
activate Category
Category --> Builder: 10 category
deactivate Category
Builder --> Controller: 11 category
deactivate Builder
Controller -> Repository: 12 category()
activate Repository
Repository --> Controller: 13 categoryRepository
Controller -> Repository: 14 save(category)
Repository --> Controller: 15 category
deactivate Repository
Controller --> UI: 15 category
deactivate Controller
UI --> SalesClerk: 16 displayCategoryInfo
deactivate UI
@enduml
